title: Intel forecasts second-quarter revenue above estimates, shares jump 19%
description: Intel forecast ​second-quarter revenue above Wall Street expectations on Thursday, underscoring booming demand for the company's server processors used for artificial intelligence in data centers.
content:
Shares of Intel surged 19% in ‌extended trading, adding $64 billion to its market value and extending its 81% rebound so far this year. Nasdaq futures rose 0.3%, showing traders expect the tech-heavy index to rise in Friday's session.

title: Meta to cut 10% of staff as it pours billions into AI
description: Meta said on Thursday it plans to lay off roughly 10% of its workforce, or about 8,000 people, the latest in a string of tech industry layoffs fueled in part by artificial intelligence.

title: Newfoundland minister cries over use of AI in post
description: A cabinet minister in Newfoundland and Labrador broke down in tears in the legislature after days of uproar over her use of artificial intelligence in a social media post.
content:
ST. JOHN’S — A cabinet minister in Newfoundland and Labrador broke down in tears in the legislature after days of uproar over her use of artificial intelligence in a social media post.

title: The A's refuse to discuss their new, AI
